ServerSideSessions.ExpiredSessionsTriggerBackchannelLogout is not configured in the code

assertions.rationale: AddServerSideSessions() is not called; response mentions it conceptually but doesn't show the code

assertions.rationale: CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession is not set in the code
